critical_questions.question: Did any headache reach maximal intensity within seconds to minutes ('thunderclap' onset)?
Any fever or neck stiffness associated with the headaches?
Any symptoms suggesting raised intracranial pressure: transient visual obscurations, pulsatile tinnitus, or headache worsening with position/Valsalva?
How many days per month is the patient using acute headache medication (triptans, NSAIDs, combination analgesics)?
Has the pattern, frequency, or character of the headaches changed recently?
